subject: Cannot log in to my account
description: I have been unable to log in since yesterday morning using my usual credentials.

subject: Password reset not working
description: The password reset link I received by email does not redirect to the reset form.

subject: Two-factor authentication blocked
description: My authenticator app is not generating the correct code for login.

subject: Account locked after failed attempts
description: My account has been locked after three failed login attempts.

subject: Username not recognised
description: The login page says my username does not exist although I registered last week.

subject: Cannot change account email
description: The account settings page does not save my new email address.

subject: Session expires too quickly
description: My session logs me out after just two minutes of inactivity.

subject: Forgot username and email changed
description: I no longer have access to the email associated with my account.

subject: App crashes on startup
description: The mobile app crashes immediately on launch after the latest update.

subject: API returns 500 errors intermittently
description: Our integration receives HTTP 500 responses roughly every ten requests.

subject: Dashboard widgets not loading
description: Three of the five dashboard widgets show a spinner indefinitely.

subject: Export to CSV produces empty file
description: Clicking the export button downloads a file with only the header row.

subject: Notifications not delivered
description: I am not receiving any in-app or email notifications despite correct settings.

subject: Search returns wrong results
description: Searching for a customer name returns unrelated records.

subject: File upload silently fails
description: Uploading attachments shows success but the file is not accessible afterwards.

subject: Page load time over 30 seconds
description: The reports page takes over 30 seconds to load with fewer than 100 records.

subject: Duplicate charge on my invoice
description: I have been billed twice for the same subscription period.

subject: Invoice shows wrong currency
description: My invoices are displayed in USD although my account is set to EUR.

subject: Refund not received after 14 days
description: I requested a refund two weeks ago and have not seen it on my statement.

subject: VAT number not appearing on invoices
description: My business VAT number does not appear on any of the generated invoices.

subject: Subscription auto-renewed unexpectedly
description: My annual subscription renewed automatically although I had cancelled it.

subject: Cannot download past invoices
description: The invoices page shows entries but the download link returns a 404 error.

subject: Promo code not applying correct discount
description: I entered a valid promo code but the checkout total was not reduced.

subject: Payment method update not saving
description: After updating my credit card details the system still charges the old card.

subject: Please add dark mode to the interface
description: A dark mode option would greatly reduce eye strain for evening users.

subject: Bulk CSV import from admin panel
description: We need to be able to import up to 10000 records directly from the admin panel.

subject: Mobile push notifications
description: Please add push notification support to the iOS and Android apps.

subject: Custom report builder
description: We need a drag-and-drop report builder to create ad-hoc reports.

subject: Two-way calendar sync
description: Please support bidirectional sync with Google Calendar and Outlook.

subject: Role-based access control per module
description: Admins need to grant per-module permissions rather than all-or-nothing roles.

subject: Keyboard shortcuts for ticket actions
description: Power users need keyboard shortcuts to close and reassign tickets without the mouse.

subject: Auto-suggest tags when creating tickets
description: As the agent types a subject the system should suggest matching tags.

subject: Clicking submit button causes 400 error
description: The submit button on the new ticket form consistently returns HTTP 400.

subject: Filter dropdown resets on page refresh
description: Applying a category filter and then refreshing the page clears the selection.

subject: Sort by date broken after row 100
description: Sorting tickets by creation date works correctly only for the first 100 rows.

subject: Assigned-to field shows wrong agent
description: After reassigning a ticket the header still shows the previous agent name.

subject: Delete confirmation modal not closing
description: The confirmation modal after deleting a ticket stays open requiring a page reload.

subject: Ticket count badge not updating
description: The unread ticket count in the navigation badge does not refresh without reload.

subject: CSV export includes deleted tickets
description: Exported CSV files contain tickets that were deleted more than a month ago.

subject: Date picker accepts invalid dates
description: The date picker allows selecting 31 February without any validation error.

subject: Error 503 on /api/tickets/import
description: The import endpoint returns 503 for files larger than 1 MB.

subject: General question about SLA policy
description: I would like to understand the response time commitment for priority tickets.

subject: Requesting a demo for my team
description: Our team of 20 would like to schedule a product demo before purchasing.

subject: Documentation link returns 404
description: The link to the API documentation in the footer returns a 404 error.

subject: Question about data residency
description: Can you confirm which region our data is stored in under the current plan?

subject: Accessibility: screen reader issues
description: Several interactive elements are not labelled correctly for screen readers.

subject: How to integrate with Slack
description: We want to post ticket updates to a Slack channel automatically.

subject: Request training materials
description: Please provide onboarding documentation for new support agents.

subject: Cannot reproduce reported crash
description: A customer reported a crash on iOS 17.4 that I cannot reproduce in testing.

subject: Data export compliance request
description: We need a full data export for GDPR compliance purposes within 30 days.
